sourcesContent:
import React from 'react';

/** Decorative accounting-themed SVGs (aria-hidden when used). */

export function IllustrationProblem() {
  return (
    <svg
      className="accounting-illustration accounting-illustration--problem"
      viewBox="0 0 400 320"
      fill="none"
      xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
    >
      <defs>
        <linearGradient id="ip-a" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%">
          <stop offset="0%" stopColor="#e03d3d" stopOpacity="0.2" />
          <stop offset="100%" stopColor="#1a2332" stopOpacity="0.12" />
        </linearGradient>
        <linearGradient id="ip-b" x1="0%" y1="100%" x2="100%" y2="0%">
          <stop offset="0%" stopColor="#2d4a6f" stopOpacity="0.15" />
          <stop offset="100%" stopColor="#dfe7f0" stopOpacity="0.5" />
        </linearGradient>
      </defs>
      <rect x="32" y="48" width="200" height="140" rx="12" fill="url(#ip-a)" stroke="rgba(26,35,50,0.1)" strokeWidth="1" />
      <path d="M56 88h152M56 112h120M56 136h100" stroke="rgba(26,35,50,0.15)" strokeWidth="4" strokeLinecap="round" />
      <rect x="220" y="100" width="140" height="100" rx="10" fill="url(#ip-b)" transform="rotate(-6 290 150)" opacity="0.95" />
      <circle cx="320" cy="72" r="36" fill="rgba(224,61,61,0.12)" stroke="rgba(224,61,61,0.25)" strokeWidth="2" />
      <path d="M308 72l8 8 16-20" stroke="#e03d3d" strokeWidth="3" strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" opacity="0.7" />
      <rect x="48" y="200" width="280" height="56" rx="8" fill="var(--color-surface)" stroke="var(--color-border-subtle)" strokeWidth="1" />
      <path d="M68 228h200M68 244h140" stroke="rgba(26,35,50,0.1)" strokeWidth="4" strokeLinecap="round" />
    </svg>
  );
}

export function IllustrationSolution() {
  return (
    <svg
      className="accounting-illustration accounting-illustration--solution"
      viewBox="0 0 400 320"
      fill="none"
      xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
    >
      <defs>
        <linearGradient id="is-a" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
          <stop offset="0%" stopColor="#22c55e" stopOpacity="0.25" />
          <stop offset="100%" stopColor="#2563eb" stopOpacity="0.12" />
        </linearGradient>
        <linearGradient id="is-b" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="0%">
          <stop offset="0%" stopColor="#e03d3d" stopOpacity="0.15" />
          <stop offset="100%" stopColor="#1a2332" stopOpacity="0.1" />
        </linearGradient>
      </defs>
      <rect x="40" y="56" width="320" height="200" rx="14" fill="var(--color-surface)" stroke="var(--color-border-subtle)" strokeWidth="1" />
      <path d="M72 240 L120 180 L168 200 L232 120 L280 152 L328 96" stroke="url(#is-b)" strokeWidth="4" strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" fill="none" />
      <path d="M72 240 L120 180 L168 200 L232 120 L280 152 L328 96 V248 H72 Z" fill="url(#is-a)" opacity="0.35" />
      <rect x="64" y="72" width="88" height="28" rx="6" fill="rgba(26,35,50,0.06)" />
      <rect x="64" y="112" width="120" height="10" rx="2" fill="rgba(26,35,50,0.08)" />
      <rect x="64" y="130" width="100" height="10" rx="2" fill="rgba(26,35,50,0.06)" />
      <circle cx="92" cy="256" r="18" fill="rgba(34,197,94,0.2)" stroke="#22c55e" strokeWidth="2" />
      <path d="M86 256l4 4 10-12" stroke="#15803d" strokeWidth="2.5" strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" />
      <rect x="248" y="200" width="96" height="64" rx="8" fill="rgba(37,99,235,0.08)" stroke="rgba(37,99,235,0.2)" strokeWidth="1" />
      <path d="M268 244h56M268 252h40" stroke="rgba(26,35,50,0.15)" strokeWidth="3" strokeLinecap="round" />
    </svg>
  );
}
